commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps plugin-provided `prependSystemContext` and `appendSystemContext` in an attributed Markdown boundary before prompt composition.

PR surface: Source +31, Tests +112. Total +143 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main still joins plugin system-context fields around the base system prompt with only blank-line separators in the live harness and embedded-runner paths. I did not run a current-main repro because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: There is a concrete mechanical repair: rebase the PR and retarget the embedded-runner edits to the current path, while leaving the final duplicate/canonical choice to maintainers.

target.title: fix(agents): bound plugin system context
target.author: monkeyleet
